goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a place to stay. The hotel should be in the 'moderate' price range and should 'include free wifi'.
The hotel should have 'a star of 4' and should 'include free parking'.
Once you find the 'hotel' you want to book it for '7 people' and '3 nights' starting from 'thursday'.
Make sure you get the 'reference number'.
You are also looking for a 'particular restaurant'. Its name is called 'restaurant two two'.
Once you find the 'restaurant' you want to book a table for 'the same group of people' at '19:30' on 'the same day'.
Make sure you get the 'reference number'.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a place to stay. The hotel should be in the moderate price range and should include free wifi
The hotel should have a star of 4 and should include free parking
Once you find the hotel you want to book it for 7 people and 3 nights starting from thursday
Make sure you get the reference number
You are also looking for a particular restaurant. Its name is called restaurant two two
Once you find the restaurant you want to book a table for the same group of people at 19:30 on the same day
Make sure you get the reference number
